## Verses (15)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | It is a good thing to give praise to the Lord, and to make melody to your name, O Most High; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | To make clear your mercy in the morning, and your unchanging faith every night; | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | On a ten-corded instrument, and on an instrument of music with a quiet sound. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | For you, O Lord, have made me glad through your work; I will have joy in the works of your hands. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | O Lord, how great are your works! and your thoughts are very deep. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | A man without sense has no knowledge of this; and a foolish man may not take it in. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | When the sinners come up like the grass, and all the workers of evil do well for themselves, it is so that their end may be eternal destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | But you, O Lord, are on high for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For see! your haters, O Lord, will be put to death; all the workers of evil will be put to flight; | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | But my horn is lifted up like the horn of the ox: the best oil is flowing on my head. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | My eyes have seen trouble come on my haters; my ears have news of the fate of the evil-doers who have come up against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | The good man will be like a tall tree in his strength; his growth will be as the wide-stretching trees of Lebanon. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Those who are planted in the house of the Lord will come up tall and strong in his gardens. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | They will give fruit even when they are old; they will be fertile and full of growth; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | For a sign that the Lord is upright; he is my Rock, there is no deceit in him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
